title: Approval Persistence Status Readback And UI Surfacing
objective: Expose the current Project Miner import-candidate approval persistence state through a read-only mutation-seam status seam and surface that state inside the PM import-intake workbench without adding frontend approval POST wiring or project import authority.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Lane Coordinator / Readback Surface Executor

source_floor.meaning: Current local, origin, and Olares clean-main after PM Lane 136 import candidate approval persistence schema and adapter implementation.

allowed_scope: Return approval persistence classification from the dedicated approval record store, not audit-log-only state.
Classify missing or unavailable approval storage without mutating state.
Include approval status readback in the local approval preview JSON, PM brief, and executor handoff exports.
Keep approval persistence status informational and keep import authority not_admitted.
Author a bounded hosted application gate executor handoff for applying only migration 003 and redeploying only the existing Render mutation-seam service.
not_allowed: No Render, Vercel, or Olares deployment.
No operations-web approval button or approval POST wiring.
No project, workpackage, task, apparatus, issue, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook, or import rows.
No workbook macro execution or workbook writeback.
No new hosted service, DNS/auth/ingress/secret change, fixture replay into live data, work authorization, field release, live work order creation, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation_result: PASS: py_compile passed for approval persistence and reads router; focused backend approval persistence tests passed with 9 passed; operations-web typecheck passed; operations-web build passed; focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed; packet JSON parse returned packet-json-ok; git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar scout recommended a strict hosted application gate for applying only apps/mutation-seam/migrations/003_pm_import_candidate_approvals.sql and redeploying only the existing Render apex-platform-mutation-seam service. It prohibited UI POST wiring, project import, service creation, secret disclosure, and production state mutation.
next_recommended_lane: PM Lane 138 - Approval Persistence Hosted Application Gate
